findings.message: New pydantic setting `widget_timeout_s` (env_prefix `APP_` => `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S`) is consumed by the application but is not declared in `.env.example`. The framework-managed env surface lists every other `APP_*` field (ENVIRONMENT, LOG_LEVEL, SLO_*, DATABASE_URL, ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL) but omits this one, so the variable is undocumented and untracked across DEV->CI->STAGE->PROD, breaking env-var parity.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` (with a short comment) to the framework-managed section of `.env.example` so the consumed variable is declared and reaches every environment's env surface.
